text:
CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: N = New 
R = Renewal 
C = Consolidation 
T = Termination 

COMMENT: The variable describes the relationship between the contract and plan ID in the reference year 
compared to the prior year. The description for these codes is in the relationship description variable 
(RELATIONSHIP_DESC). 

The contract and plan ID for the reference year (year of the data file) could be related to more than 
one contract and plan ID in the previous year
